body:
## Rationale

**GSC content gap:** 'joey jordison drum set' — 117 impressions / 0.85% CTR / pos 8.0 (top content-gap query from metrics.md). This proposal directly fills the main missing article in the Jordison cluster.

**Arc gap:** Iowa ✅ → **Vol. 3: The Subliminal Verses** ← MISSING → All Hope Is Gone ✅ → The Gray Chapter ✅ → We Are Not Your Kind ✅

**Verified MISSING:** `vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup` confirmed absent from albumArticles.js (198 slugs). Not in any open proposal.

**Album facts:**
- Released May 25, 2004 on Roadrunner Records
- Debuted #1 on US Billboard 200 AND UK Albums Chart
- 2× Platinum certified (RIAA)
- Grammy nominated: 'Before I Forget' — Best Metal Performance 2005 (won)
- Also nominated: 'Duality' — Best Hard Rock Performance 2005
- Represents Joey Jordison's technical apex — 'The Blister Exists' and 'Pulse of the Maggots' showcase his double-bass and polyrhythm work

**Joey Jordison gear for Vol. 3 era:**
- Drums: Pearl Masters Premium series (MCX shells)
- Cymbals: Zildjian A Custom + Z series for effects
- Snare: Pearl Free-Floating brass 14×6.5
- Pedals: Pearl Demon Drive double-pedal
- Notable: first Slipknot album recorded at Henson Recording (formerly A&M), engineered by Greg Fidelman
- LLM hook: 'What drum kit did Joey Jordison use on Vol. 3?' / 'What is Slipknot's best album for drumming?'

## File to create
- **Article:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup` entry
- **LLM file:** `public/llms/articles/vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (drum kit, pedal brand, Grammy nomination, era gear)
- Internal links ≥3: /drummer/joey-jordison, /articles/iowa-drum-setup, /articles/all-hope-is-gone-drum-setup
- Schema: Person (Joey Jordison) + MusicAlbum
- relatedAlbums: ['iowa-drum-setup', 'all-hope-is-gone-drum-setup', 'slipknot-self-titled-drum-setup']

## Estimated organic uplift
Directly addresses 'joey jordison drum set' content gap (117 impr / 0.85% CTR). Also captures: 'vol 3 drum setup', 'joey jordison 2004 kit', 'slipknot subliminal verses drums'. Targets same query cluster as /drummer/joey-jordison which has 29 GA4 views this week — highest traffic page on site.

## Verify
1. `node -e` check: `vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup` appears in Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES)
2. /articles/vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup renders 200 with title 'Vol. 3: The Subliminal Verses Drum Setup — Joey Jordison'
3. /llms/articles/vol-3-the-subliminal-verses-drum-setup.md returns 200 text/markdown
4. JSON-LD includes `@type: 'MusicAlbum'` with Joey Jordison as byArtist
5. Internal links resolve: iowa-drum-setup, all-hope-is-gone-drum-setup

## Done
- [ ] albumArticles.js entry added
- [ ] LLM markdown file created
- [ ] Sitemap auto-syncs (sources from ALBUM_ARTICLES dynamically)
title: SEO: Slipknot 'Vol. 3: The Subliminal Verses' drum setup article (Joey Jordison, 2004 — fills Iowa → Vol.3 → All Hope Is Gone arc, addresses #1 GSC content gap)
